headline: Invesco Exit Highlights MasTec Gains And Ongoing AI Infrastructure Role
summary: Invesco Small Cap Value Fund highlighted MasTec (NYSE:MTZ) as a key player in AI infrastructure, focusing on fiber networks and data centers. After a strong Q4 rally, the fund fully exited its position in MasTec, locking in gains and reallocating capital. The move brings fresh attention to MasTec's role in critical AI related infrastructure projects and its evolving business mix. MasTec comes into this spotlight with a current share price of $285.61 and a 1 year return of 147.3%, alongside...
